_description: lint-warn-visibility-advisory step outcome=cancelled (lint_run cancelled mid-execution). The lint advisory block in the YAML has only 2 strict-gates checks (`result != success/skipped` and `outcome == failure`); it does NOT have a third `outcome != success/skipped` check. So `outcome=cancelled` correctly PASSES under STRICT_GATES — matching the YAML's actual behavior. This fixture demonstrates the asymmetry vs cssom-full-advisory (which would FAIL on the same outcome). Codex thread 019dfa66 iter-1 finding 1 — keep parity with YAML.
